title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 266.420 - Untreated garbage not to be fed, exception
text:
266.420.  Untreated garbage not to be fed, exception. — No person, other than an individual who feeds to his own swine only the garbage obtained from his own household, shall feed garbage to swine unless such garbage has been heated to a temperature of 212 degrees Fahrenheit (boiling point) and fed in compliance with rules and regulations promulgated by and under permits issued by the state department of agriculture.
(L. 1953 p. 6 § 2)
